nasb.text: Now there were four supports at the four corners of each stand; its supports were part of the stand itself.

esv.text: There were four supports at the four corners of each stand. The supports were of one piece with the stands.

cnv.text: 每一個盆座的四角都有四個支架；支架是與盆座一塊鑄成的。

ccb.text: 每个盆座的四角都有支脚，支脚和盆座一起铸成。
